{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Lichborn ships
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Lichborn ships]] are designed with bones and green light.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Lichborn ships]] formed a defensive screen around the planet.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
